title: mentha aquatica var. elongata
intro: Mentha aquatica var. elongata, also known as Elongated Water Mint, is a variant of the Water Mint plant that is characterized by its elongated leaves and stems. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. elongata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Mentha aquatica var. elongata are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as salves and poultices.
